account_access_role_id.description: UUID of the AWS account access role to use for this job

config_id.description: Optional configuration ID for the job

target_instance_ids.description: List of EC2 instance IDs to target

playbook_id.description: UUID of a previously uploaded playbook (mutually exclusive with playbook_s3_key)

playbook_s3_key.description: S3 key for the playbook file (mutually exclusive with playbook_id)

extra_vars.description: Optional extra variables for the playbook
